# CWE-263 — Password Aging with Long Expiration (vulnerable)
lang: go
file: CWE-263-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"time"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
	"gorm.io/gorm"
)

type Policy struct {
	MaxAgeDays int
}

// Vulnerable: policy allows passwords to live for ten years.
func CheckPasswordPolicy(c *gin.Context, db *gorm.DB) {
	policy := Policy{MaxAgeDays: 3650}
	changed := c.GetTime("password_changed")
	if time.Since(changed) < time.Duration(policy.MaxAgeDays)*24*time.Hour {
		c.JSON(200, gin.H{"ok": true})
		return
	}
	c.JSON(403, gin.H{"error": "expired"})
}
